# BaroLab

BaroLab is an independent Barotrauma community platform for discovering mods, submarines, guides, tags, load order information, vanilla game data and encyclopedia entries.

BaroLab is built for Barotrauma players, modders, submarine creators and server owners.

BaroLab is not affiliated with FakeFish, Undertow Games, Daedalic Entertainment, Steam or Valve.

## Main sections

- Home: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/
- Mods: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/mods
- Submarines: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/submarines
- Guides: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/guides
- Tags: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/tags
- Load Order: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/load-order
- Vanilla Data: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/vanilla
- Encyclopedia: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/encyclopedia
- About: https://barolab.i-lab.ink/about

## Content types

Mod pages contain Barotrauma mod names, authors, descriptions, tags, ratings, downloads and update dates.

Submarine pages contain Barotrauma submarine names, classes, tiers, descriptions and technical characteristics.

Guide pages contain Barotrauma community guides and reference materials.

Encyclopedia pages contain Barotrauma game data entries for creatures, items and mechanics.

Tags pages contain categorization tags used across Barotrauma mods and submarines.

Load Order pages contain tools for managing Barotrauma mod load order and resolving conflicts.

Vanilla Data pages contain reference data from the base Barotrauma game.

## Crawling notes

Public pages may be crawled. Login is only required for user actions such as posting, commenting, saving, editing or account settings.

## Note on domain

<!-- If BaroLab moves to a new domain, update all URLs in this file accordingly. -->
